title: NTSC Broadcast
short description: National Television System Committee (NTSC) Television broadcast is an analogue television broadcast mode. Currently being phased out in parts of the world in favor of digital broadcast.
description: **National Television System Committee (NTSC) Television** broadcast is an analogue television broadcast mode. Currently being phased out in parts of the world in favor of digital broadcast. The successor of NTSC is [ATSC](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/ATSC_Broadcast).
